- Shop gopro mounts adapters - Amazon.com® Official Site: Find deals and compare prices on gopro mounts adapters at Amazon.com. Browse & discover thousands of brands. Read customer reviews & find best sellers
- ARKON 1/4"-20 Camera Mounting Thread to 3-Prong GoPro HERO Mount Adapter: The mount features a 3-prong action camera mount with a thumbscrew on top and a 1/4"-20 female thread on the bottom. It is designed to adapt your 2-prong camera mount onto a tripod or rig with a 1/4"-20 screw mount.
- Tripod Adapters | GoPro: These adapters let you attach your GoPro to any tripod, monopod or camera accessory with a standard 1/4-20 mount. The finger adapter lets you mount your GoPro directly to the tripod, while the ball joint adapter makes your tripod more versatile by letting you tilt and rotate your camera to find the

- GoPro to 1/4"-20 Camera Mount Adapter - makerworld.com: This is a custom-designed adapter that allows you to mount a GoPro on a standard camera mount with a 1/4"-20 thread. The design is optimized for strength and durability, ensuring a secure fit for action cameras in various mounting scenarios.

build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 25, 25)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(6).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature for 3-prong clip top — .workplane(offset=25).rect(40, 18).extrude(2)

STEP 4: Create thread insert bottom — .faces("<Z").workplane().circle(7.5).extrude(-25)
